mapper.sql: id, user_id, project_id, task_id, work_date, hours, content, status, reject_reason, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_time_entry (user_id, project_id, task_id, work_date, hours, content, status, reject_reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{workDate}, #{hours}, #{content}, #{status}, #{rejectReason})
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name AS userName, r.name AS roleName, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(e.work_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(e.work_date) = #{month} AND e.status = 1 THEN e.hours END), 0) AS monthHours, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.status = 1 THEN e.hours END), 0) AS totalHours FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_time_entry e ON u.id = e.user_id
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, r.name ORDER BY totalHours DESC

SELECT p.id AS projectId, p.name AS projectName, p.dept, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(e.work_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(e.work_date) = #{month} AND e.status = 1 THEN e.hours END), 0) AS monthHours, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.status = 1 THEN e.hours END), 0) AS totalHours FROM tb_project p LEFT JOIN tb_time_entry e ON p.id = e.project_id
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.dept ORDER BY totalHours DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_time_entry SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM tb_time_entry WHERE status = 1 AND YEAR(work_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(work_date) = #{month}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM tb_time_entry WHERE status = 1

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name AS userName, COALESCE(SUM(e.hours), 0) AS totalHours FROM tb_user u INNER JOIN tb_time_entry e ON u.id = e.user_id AND e.status = 1 GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY totalHours DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT e.id, u.name AS userName, p.name AS projectName, t.name AS taskName, e.hours, e.work_date AS workDate, e.status FROM tb_time_entry e JOIN tb_user u ON e.user_id = u.id JOIN tb_project p ON e.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_task t ON e.task_id = t.id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC LIMIT 10
